zh.lifeSummary: 當Lucia Hellesby於1295年出生時，她的父親William Hellesby27歲，母親Alice Hawise de Trussell25歲。她於大約1308年與Peter Thorton結婚。他們至少是9個女兒的父母。她去世於1335年在英國爾享年40歲。

nameMeanings.name: Lucia
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Feminine form of the old Roman given name Lucius, which is probably a derivative of Latin lux ‘light’. The girl's name is common in Italy and elsewhere, and is found as a learned, Latinate doublet of Lucy in England. St Lucia of Syracuse, who was martyred in 304 , was a very popular saint in the Middle Ages; she is often represented in medieval art as blinded and with her eyes on a platter, but the tradition that she had her eyes put out is probably based on nothing more than the association between light and eyes.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

en.lifeSummary: When Lucia Hellesby was born in 1295, her father, William Hellesby, was 27 and her mother, Alice Hawise de Trussell, was 25. She married Peter Thorton about 1308. They were the parents of at least 9 daughters. She died in 1335, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 40.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucia Hellesbyが1295年に生まれた時，父William Hellesbyは27歳，母Alice Hawise de Trussellは25歳であった。約1308年にPeter Thortonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の娘の親であった。彼女は1335年にイギリスチェシュアイアで40歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucia Hellesby(이)가 1295년에 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Hellesby(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Alice Hawise de Trussell(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 대략 1308년 Peter Thorton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1335년 영국 체실르에서 40세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lucia Hellesby родилась в 1295 г., её отцу по имени William Hellesby было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Alice Hawise de Trussell, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Peter Thorton около 1308 г. У них было по крайней мере 9 дочерей. Она умерла в 1335 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 40 лет.
